summary: Plan-only remediation assessment for five open PRs. No GitHub mutations are allowed by the job. No security-sensitive item was detected. One small PR has objective failing checks and needs contributor-branch repair; the remaining PRs are blocked from merge recommendation by missing merge preflight proof, broad risk, or active-author status.

actions.reason: Missing required merge-preflight proof blocks a merge recommendation even though the PR looks narrow and well tested.
Repair the contributor branch and rerun the focused UI/proof checks before any merge recommendation.
Broad product/UI/runtime surface plus missing merge-preflight proof makes this a maintainer review decision, not an automated merge or repair plan.
Active-author status and auth-provider merge risk require maintainer review before any automated merge recommendation.
The PR is clean and well checked, but compatibility/session-state risk and XL scope require maintainer review before merge.

needs_human: #89226: missing required merge preflight proof, including Codex /review and current mergeability proof.
#90610: broad L-sized product/runtime/UI change with missing merge preflight proof.
#90689: active-author status plus auth-provider merge risk requires maintainer review.
#91274: XL compatibility/session-state refactor requires maintainer review despite clean checks.
